textui-designer.supportedFileExtensions.description: Choose which file extensions TextUI Designer treats as TextUI DSL files.

textui-designer.autoPreview.enabled.description: Open the Preview automatically when you open a TextUI file.

textui-designer.devTools.enabled.description: Allow the WebView developer tools command for troubleshooting extension internals.

textui-designer.webview.disableThemeVari.description: Use TextUI preview styling instead of inheriting VS Code theme variables.

textui-designer.webview.theme.description: Choose the Preview theme: follow VS Code, light, or dark.

textui-designer.webview.fontSize.description: Set the Preview font size in pixels.

textui-designer.webview.jumpToDsl.showHo.description: Show the hover hint for jumping from Preview components back to YAML.

textui-designer.preview.showUpdateIndica.description: Show a small status indicator when the Preview refreshes.

textui-designer.export.defaultFormat.description: Choose the export format used when no format is specified.

textui-designer.export.includeComments.description: エクスポート時にコメントを含める

textui-designer.export.minify.description: エクスポート時にコードを圧縮

textui-designer.diagnostics.enabled.description: Show validation diagnostics for TextUI files.

textui-designer.schema.validation.enable.description: Validate TextUI files against the bundled schemas.

textui-designer.schema.autoReload.description: スキーマの自動再読み込み

path.description: テンプレートファイルのパス

textui-designer.templates.customTemplate.description: カスタムテンプレートの設定

textui-designer.performance.webviewDebou.description: Delay Preview refreshes while typing, in milliseconds.

textui-designer.performance.diagnosticDe.description: 診断のデバウンス時間（ミリ秒）

textui-designer.performance.completionDe.description: 補完のデバウンス時間（ミリ秒）

textui-designer.performance.cacheTTL.description: キャッシュの有効期限（ミリ秒）

textui-designer.performance.schemaCacheT.description: スキーマキャッシュの有効期限（ミリ秒）

textui-designer.performance.memoryMonito.description: メモリ使用量の監視間隔（ミリ秒、開発時のみ）

textui-designer.performance.enablePerfor.description: パフォーマンスログの有効化

textui-designer.performance.enableMemory.description: Track TextUI Designer memory usage for troubleshooting.

textui-designer.performance.memoryMeasur.description: メモリ測定間隔（ミリ秒）

textui-designer.performance.memoryCleanu.description: メモリクリーンアップ間隔（ミリ秒）

textui-designer.mcp.autoConfigure.description: 拡張起動時にMCP設定を自動構成する（workspace: .vscode/mcp.json、user: ~/.config/.../mcp.json または .codex/config.toml の mcp_servers を更新）

textui-designer.mcp.scope.description: Choose where TextUI Designer writes MCP client configuration.

textui-designer.mcp.command.description: MCPサーバー起動コマンド（通常はnode）

textui-designer.mcp.notifyOnConfigured.description: MCP設定更新時に通知を表示する
